item.title: Deepak Builders & Engineers India Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 65.58 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the second consecutive session, Deepak Builders & Engineers India Ltd has seen its share price slide further, hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 65.58 on 24 Mar 2026. This decline extends a losing streak that has erased nearly 12% of value over just two days, underscoring persistent selling pressure amid challenging market conditions. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But R K Swamy Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broader market rally, R K Swamy Ltd has plunged to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 77.75 on 24 Mar 2026, marking a steep decline of 67.86% over the past year and underperforming the Sensex by a wide margin. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push Plaza Wires Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, Plaza Wires Ltd closed lower, hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 31 on 24 Mar 2026. This marks a near 55.5% decline from its 52-week high of Rs 69.75, underscoring a sustained downtrend amid mixed financial signals and broader market pressures. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push Suvidhaa Infoserve Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: For the fifth straight session, Suvidhaa Infoserve Ltd closed lower, breaching its 52-week low at Rs 2.5 on 24 Mar 2026, marking a cumulative decline of 16.39% over this period. This persistent downtrend contrasts sharply with the broader market's modest recovery, underscoring the stock's ongoing struggles. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Digicontent Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Shares of Digicontent Ltd, a player in the Media & Entertainment sector, declined to a fresh 52-week low of ₹22.33 on 24 March 2026, marking a significant downturn in the stock’s performance over the past year. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push Stovec Industries Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: Stovec Industries Ltd’s stock price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.1544.95 on 24 March 2026, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing downward trajectory. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting persistent challenges in financial performance and market sentiment. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Mohit Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 20 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: Mohit Industries Ltd, a player in the Garments & Apparels sector, has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.20 on 24 March 2026, marking a significant decline amid a sustained downward trend. The stock has underperformed both its sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing pressures on its valuation and market sentiment. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Starteck Finance Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 245 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the second consecutive session, Starteck Finance Ltd has seen its share price decline, hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 245 on 24 Mar 2026. This marks a significant 32.3% drop from its 52-week high of Rs 361.8, underscoring persistent selling pressure amid a challenging market backdrop. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But V-Mart Retail Ltd. Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: V-Mart Retail Ltd. has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.491.55 on 24 March 2026, marking a significant decline in its share price amid ongoing market pressures and company-specific factors. The stock’s recent performance reflects a continuation of a downward trend, with notable underperformance relative to its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Gujarat Lease Financing Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: While the broader market showed signs of recovery, Gujarat Lease Financing Ltd has continued its downward trajectory, hitting a fresh 52-week low on 24 Mar 2026 amid persistent selling pressure and weak fundamentals. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Panchsheel Organics Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 92 Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: A sustained decline has pushed Panchsheel Organics Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 92 on 24 Mar 2026, marking a significant -37.49% drop over the past year and underscoring persistent headwinds for the micro-cap pharmaceutical player. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Country Condos Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 3.84 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline has pushed Country Condos Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 3.84 on 24 Mar 2026, marking a significant 68.2% drop from its peak of Rs 12.06 within the last year. This downturn comes amid a broader market environment where the Sensex itself is struggling, but the stock’s underperformance is notably more severe. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Enkei Wheels India Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broader market rally, Enkei Wheels India Ltd has succumbed to selling pressure, hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 380 on 24 Mar 2026. This decline comes amid a backdrop of mixed financial signals and persistent valuation concerns. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Manali Petrochemicals Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 42 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A 48.15% decline from its 52-week high of Rs 81 has dragged Manali Petrochemicals Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 42 on 24 Mar 2026, marking a significant downturn amid a broader market environment that itself is showing signs of strain. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Indraprastha Gas Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broader market rally, Indraprastha Gas Ltd has slipped to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 147.35 on 24 Mar 2026, marking a continuation of its recent downward trajectory with a 5.46% decline over the past two sessions. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Lypsa Gems & Jewellery Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Lypsa Gems & Jewellery Ltd’s stock price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.4.22 on 24 March 2026, marking a significant downturn amid broader market volatility and company-specific headwinds. The stock’s recent performance reflects ongoing pressures within the gems and jewellery sector, compounded by weak financial metrics and technical indicators. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push TPL Plastech Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: TPL Plastech Ltd’s share price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.56.33 on 24 March 2026, marking a significant downturn for the packaging company amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: BSEL ALGO Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 3.63 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fourth consecutive session, BSEL ALGO Ltd has closed lower, culminating in a fresh 52-week low of Rs 3.63 on 24 Mar 2026. This marks a significant 15.74% decline over the past four days, underscoring persistent selling pressure amid a challenging market backdrop. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Key Corp Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Key Corp Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, recorded a fresh 52-week low of Rs.63.01 on 24 March 2026, marking a significant decline amid persistent downward momentum. The stock has underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing pressures on its financial performance and valuation metrics. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Kohinoor Foods Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 21.34 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the second consecutive session, Kohinoor Foods Ltd has seen its share price decline, hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 21.34 on 24 Mar 2026. This drop extends the stock’s downward trend, with a 6.01% loss over the last two days, underperforming its sector by 2.81% today alone. Time: 14 minutes ago
